problem id: 36f13669
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) AND SHR(3)) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  11100010 -> 00001011
  00110100 -> 00000000
  01101111 -> 00001101
  01000001 -> 00000001
  00011100 -> 00000000
  10001000 -> 00000010
  00100011 -> 00000100

query: 00100010
predicted answer: 00000000
